evals.prompt: /sourceverify "Vaswani, A., Shazeer, N., Parmar, N., et al. (2017). Attention is all you need. Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems, 30."
evals.expected_output: VERIFIED or VERIFIED WITH ERRORS status, corrected APA7 reference, field-level results, summary

assertions.name: Makes a real API call (not answering from training knowledge)
assertions.description: The output shows evidence of an actual curl call to the SourceVerify API — job IDs, document IDs, or live polling status messages should appear

assertions.name: Returns VERIFIED or VERIFIED WITH ERRORS (not UNVERIFIED)
assertions.description: Attention is All You Need is a real, well-known paper — the API should confirm it. Result should show VERIFIED or VERIFIED WITH ERRORS, not UNVERIFIED or NEEDS HUMAN REVIEW

assertions.name: Shows a corrected/formatted reference
assertions.description: The output includes an APA7-formatted corrected version of the reference

assertions.name: Includes a summary section
assertions.description: The output ends with a summary showing counts (total, verified, unverified, etc.)

assertions.name: API key is not visible in the output
assertions.description: The API key (sk_...) should not appear anywhere in the displayed response

evals.prompt: /sourceverify "Chen, L., & Williams, R. (2021). Deep reinforcement learning for autonomous citation validation. IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks, 34(2), 891-904."
evals.expected_output: UNVERIFIED or NEEDS HUMAN REVIEW status, explanation of why, no hallucinated confirmation

assertions.name: Makes a real API call (not answering from training knowledge)
assertions.description: The output shows evidence of an actual curl call — job IDs, document IDs, or polling messages

assertions.name: Returns UNVERIFIED or NEEDS HUMAN REVIEW (not VERIFIED)
assertions.description: This reference appears to be fabricated. The skill should surface that — result should be UNVERIFIED or NEEDS HUMAN REVIEW, not VERIFIED

assertions.name: Does not confirm the reference exists from its own knowledge
assertions.description: The response should not claim the paper exists or describe its contents without API evidence. All claims should come from the API result

assertions.name: Includes an explanation of the verdict
assertions.description: The result includes some explanation of why the reference couldn't be verified (not found, no match, etc.)

evals.expected_output: Token counts (subscription, purchased, total), plan name, no errors

assertions.name: Calls the balance API endpoint
assertions.description: Output shows evidence of a curl call to /api/verify-reference/balance

assertions.name: Shows token counts
assertions.description: Output includes numeric token values — subscription tokens, purchased tokens, and/or total available

assertions.name: Shows plan information
assertions.description: Output includes the user's current plan name

assertions.name: API key is not visible in the output
assertions.description: The API key (sk_...) should not appear anywhere in the displayed response

evals.prompt: /sourceverify "Vaswani, A., Shazeer, N., Parker, N., et al. (2017). Attention is all you need. Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems, 30."
evals.expected_output: VERIFIED WITH ERRORS status, corrected reference showing the real author name, field-level results showing the contradiction

assertions.name: Makes a real API call
assertions.description: Output shows evidence of an actual curl call — job IDs, document IDs, or polling messages

assertions.name: Returns VERIFIED WITH ERRORS (not plain VERIFIED or UNVERIFIED)
assertions.description: The reference is real but has a field-level error — status should be VERIFIED WITH ERRORS

assertions.name: Shows corrected reference with real author name
assertions.description: The corrected APA7 reference should include the correct author name (Parmar, not Parker)

assertions.name: Shows which fields had errors
assertions.description: The field results section indicates which field(s) had a CONTRADICTION or MISMATCH
